common.swipeHint: Swayiphela kwesokudla ukuze ukhethe, kwesokunxele ukuze ubone okulandelayo, noma phezulu ukuze uthole ulwazi olwengeziwe
common.reviewAgain: Sicela ubuyekeze izinketho futhi ukuze ukhethe

intro.welcome: Siyakwamukela ku-Ellie! Ngilapha ukuze ngikusize uhlele ikhalenda lakho leshifu. Ake siqale ngokukwazi kangcono.
intro.askOccupation: Kuhle ukuhlangana nawe, {{name}}! Yini indima yakho eceleni?
intro.allSet: Iphelele! Usulungile, {{name}}. Masilungise ikhalenda lakho leshifu.

placeholders.name: Faka igama lakho
placeholders.occupation: isb. Ummeli we-haul truck, Boilermaker, Ugesi

editResponse.title: Hlela Impendulo
editResponse.message: Hlela impendulo yakho. Ingxoxo izohlehla ukusuka kuleli phuzu.

errors.nameTooShort: Igama kufanele libe nezinhlamvu okungenani ezi-2
errors.nameInvalidChars: Igama lingaqukatha kuphela izinhlamvu, izikhala, amakhonco, nama-aphostrophe
errors.countryTooShort: Izwe kufanele okungenani libe nezinhlamvu ezingu-2

shiftSystem.title: Isayithi Lakho Lisebenza Kangakanani?
shiftSystem.reviewAgain: Sicela ubuyekeze amasistimu futhi ukuze ukhethe
shiftSystem.instruction:
Khetha ukuthi isayithi lakho lisebenza kanjani—sizokwakha ikhalenda lakho kulokhu
Swayiphela kwesokudla ukuze ukhethe, kwesokunxele ukuze ubone okwengeziwe, ukuze uthole ulwazi

endState.selectedSubtitle: Okulandelayo, sizokhetha iphethini yakho ethile yokuzungezisa

2-shift.title: 2 Amashifu (amahora ayi-12)
2-shift.description: Imigodi yakho isebenza ngamashifu amabili amahora ayi-12—eyodwa emini, enye ebusuku

3-shift.title: 3 Amashifu (amahora angu-8)
3-shift.description: Indawo yakho yokucubungula isebenza ngamashifu amathathu wamahora angu-8—ekuseni, ntambama nasebusuku

shiftPattern.reviewAgain: Sicela ubuyekeze amaphethini futhi ukuze ukhethe

endState.reviewedSubtitle: Awuzange uyibone eyakho? Ungakha engokwezifiso, noma ubheke okunye

shiftPattern.instruction:
Khetha ukuzungezisa okusetshenziswa esikhundleni sakho semigodi—sizokwakha ikhalenda lakho kulokhu
Swayiphela kwesokudla ukuze ukhethe, kwesokunxele ukuze ubone okwengeziwe, ukuze uthole ulwazi
shiftPattern.title: Kuyini Ukuzungeziswa Kohlelo lwakho?

4-4-4.name: 4-4-4 Ukujikeleza
4-4-4.description: Sebenza amashifu ezinsuku ezi-4, bese kuba amashifu ama-4 ebusuku, bese uthola izinsuku ezi-4 ungekho okuvamile kumasayithi okundiza okungena ngaphakathi.

7-7-7.name: 7-7-7 Ukujikeleza
7-7-7.schedule: izinsuku eziyisi-7 • ubusuku obuyisi-7 • isaphulelo sika-7
7-7-7.description: Iviki eligcwele lamashifu osuku, bese kuba ubusuku, bese kuba isonto lekhefu-elihle kakhulu ukuhlela kusengaphambili

2-2-3.name: 2-2-3 Ukujikeleza
2-2-3.description: Ukushintshashintsha okufushane kwezinsuku ezi-2, ubusuku obu-2, bese kuba izinsuku ezi-3 zokuphumula-uthola amakhefu kaningi

5-5-5.name: 5-5-5 Ukujikeleza
5-5-5.schedule: Izinsuku ezi-5 • Ubusuku obu-5 • Isaphulelo sika-5
5-5-5.description: Sebenza amashifu osuku olu-5, bese kuba amashifu ama-5 ebusuku, bese izinsuku ezi-5 ungasebenzi - endaweni ephakathi nendawo

3-3-3.name: 3-3-3 Ukujikeleza
3-3-3.description: Ukushintshashintsha okufushane kwamashifu wezinsuku ezi-3, amashifu ama-3 ebusuku, bese kuba yizinsuku ezi-3 zokujikeleza ngokushesha

10-10-10.name: 10-10-10 Ukujikeleza
10-10-10.schedule: Izinsuku eziyi-10 • ubusuku obuyi-10 • ikhefu le-10
10-10-10.description: Ukushintshashintsha okude kwezinsuku eziyi-10, ubusuku obuyi-10, bese kuthi i-10 ikhuphule isikhathi sakho ekhaya

continental.name: Ukujikeleza Kwezwekazi
continental.description: Sebenza amashifu ama-2 ekuseni, 2 ntambama, 2 ebusuku, bese izinsuku ezi-4 ungasebenzi - amahora angama-8 weshifu

pitman.name: Pitman Isheduli
pitman.description: Ukushintshashintsha okufushane kwamashifu wezinsuku ezi-2, bese kuba amashifu amabili ebusuku, bese kuba izinsuku ezi-3 ngaphandle komjikelezo ohlangene wezinsuku eziyi-7

custom.name: Ukuzungezisa Ngokwezifiso
custom.description: Isayithi lakho lisebenzisa okuthile okuhlukile? Yakha okwakho ukuzungezisa lapha

fifo-8-6.name: I-FIFO 8/6
fifo-8-6.schedule: Ukusebenza kwezinsuku eziyi-8 • Izinsuku eziyisi-6 ekhaya
fifo-8-6.description: Sebenza izinsuku eziyi-8 ezilandelanayo endaweni, bese izinsuku eziyisi-6 usekhaya-okudumile ezimayini ze-WA

fifo-7-7.name: I-FIFO 7/7 (Isikhathi Esilinganayo)
fifo-7-7.schedule: Umsebenzi wesonto eli-1 • Isonto eli-1 ekhaya
fifo-7-7.description: Isonto elilodwa esizeni, isonto elilodwa ekhaya-ibhalansi ephelele engu-50/50

fifo-14-14.name: I-FIFO 14/14 (Isikhathi Sokulingana)
fifo-14-14.description: Amaviki amabili esizeni, amaviki amabili ebhalansi yempilo esebenza kahle ekhaya

fifo-14-7.name: I-FIFO 14/7 (2:1)
fifo-14-7.schedule: Umsebenzi wamaviki ama-2 • Isonto eli-1 ekhaya
fifo-14-7.description: Amaviki amabili esizeni, isonto elilodwa emandleni okuthola imali ephezulu ekhaya

fifo-21-7.name: I-FIFO 21/7 (3:1)
fifo-21-7.schedule: Umsebenzi wamaviki ama-3 • Isonto eli-1 ekhaya
fifo-21-7.description: Amaviki amathathu esizeni, isonto elilodwa usekhaya-ngemisebenzi ekude kakhulu

fifo-28-14.name: I-FIFO 28/14 (2:1)
fifo-28-14.schedule: Umsebenzi wamaviki ama-4 • Amaviki ama-2 usekhaya
fifo-28-14.description: Amaviki amane esizeni, amasonto amabili ekhaya-ezindaweni ezikude ezikude

fifo-custom.name: I-FIFO yangokwezifiso
fifo-custom.description: Isayithi lakho le-FIFO lisebenzisa uhlelo oluhlukile? Lungiselela amabhlogo akho omsebenzi/ukuphumula

rosterType.title: Lusebenza Kanjani Uhlu Lwakho?
rosterType.instruction:
Khetha isitayela sohlelo olusetshenziswa esikhundleni sakho semigodi - lokhu kulolonga uhlelo lwakho lonke
Swayiphela kwesokudla ukuze ukhethe, kwesokunxele ukuze ubone okwengeziwe, ukuze uthole imininingwane

rotating.title: Uhlu Oluzungezayo
rotating.subtitle: Izinsuku → Ubusuku → Iphethini evaliwe
rotating.description: Uzungezisa izikhathi zokushintsha ezahlukene emjikelezweni ophindayo

details.howItWorks: Abasebenzi bashintshana ngezikhathi ezihlukene zamashifu (amashifu osuku, amashifu ebusuku, izinsuku zokuphumula) ngomjikelezo oqhubekayo
pros: Hamba ekhaya nsuku zonke noma njalo

fifo.title: I-FIFO / Swing Roster
fifo.subtitle: Amabhulokhi okusebenza → Amabhulokhi asekhaya
fifo.description: Usebenza izinsuku ezilandelanayo endaweni, bese uthola isikhathi esengeziwe ekhaya

details.howItWorks: Izisebenzi zindizela ezindaweni ezikude, zisebenze izinsuku ezilandelanayo (indawo yomsebenzi), bese zindizela ekhaya ukuze ziphumule isikhathi eside (indawo yokuphumula)

completion.saveFailed: Yehlulekile ukulondoloza idatha yakho. Sicela uzame futhi.

features.remindersDesc: Ungalokothi uphuthelwe ukubizwa — izikhumbuzi ezihlakaniphile ezijwayelana ne-roster swing yakho
features.sleepDesc: Lungiselela ukuphumula kwakho phakathi kwamashifu ngezibalo zokulala eziqondene nawe
features.fatigueDesc: Qaphela ingozi yokukhathala kumashifu amade — kubalulekile kuphepha engaphansi komhlaba
features.teamDesc: Bona ishejuli yeqembu lakho futhi uhlanganise ukunikezela kalula
features.balanceDesc: Hlala unempilo phakathi kwama-FIFO swings nge-routine ne-wellness tracking
features.earningsDesc: Bala izibonelelo zesite, i-FIFO loadings, nokungeziwe ngokuzenzakalelayo
features.mealsDesc: Hlala ugcwele amanzi nonamandla ngamashifu amahora ayi-12 engaphansi komhlaba

completion.featureHint: Thepha i-chip yesici ukuze ubone imininingwane eyengeziwe.
completion.getStartedA11yHint: Thepha ukuze uqale ukusebenzisa uhlelo lokusebenza
completion.retryA11yHint: Thepha ukuze uzame ukulondoloza idatha yakho futhi
completion.subtitle: Siyakwamukela ku-Ellie
completion.title: Usulungile!

errors.missingRequiredInformation: Ulwazi oludingekayo luyashoda: {{fields}}. Sicela ubuyele emuva uqede zonke izinyathelo.

phaseSelector.daySubtitle: Uthe uku-{{selectedPhaseTitle}}. Swayiphela osukwini lwakho lwamanje—ingabe i-{{dayList}}?
phaseSelector.title: Usebenza kuyiphi i-shift njengamanje?

title.workPattern: Asebenza kanjani amashifu ngesikhathi somsebenzi wakho we-FIFO?

subtitle.workPattern: Swayiphela kwesokudla ukuze ukhethe iphethini yakho yesivimbeli somsebenzi, kwesokunxele ukuze uthole inketho elandelayo, noma phezulu ukuze uthole ulwazi
subtitle.swingConfig: Setha ukuthi zingaki izinsuku zeshifu nosuku-shift osebenza ngazo ngaphambi kokukhetha ibhulokhi yakho yamanje
subtitle.block: Swayiphela kwesokudla ukuze ukhethe, kwesokunxele ukuze ubone okulandelayo, noma phezulu ukuze uthole ulwazi olwengeziwe
subtitle.dayWithinBlock: Swayiphela kwesokudla ukuze ukhethe, kwesokunxele ukuze ubone okulandelayo, noma phezulu ukuze uthole ulwazi olwengeziwe. Ingabe i-{{ordinalList}}?

straightDays.title: Izinsuku Eziqondile
straightDays.description: Ibhulokhi yakho yomsebenzi isebenzisa amashifu osuku kuphela.
straightDays.quickInfo: Okuhle kakhulu ekusebenzeni okugcina bonke abasebenzi beshintshashintsha emini.

straightNights.title: Ubusuku obuqondile
straightNights.description: Ibhulokhi yakho yomsebenzi isebenzisa amashifu ebusuku kuphela.
straightNights.quickInfo: Sebenzisa lokhu lapho abasebenzi besizinda behlala emashifu ebusuku ukuze basebenze ngokugcwele.

swing.title: I-Swing roster
swing.description: Ibhulokhi yakho yomsebenzi ihlanganisa amashifu emini nasebusuku.
swing.quickInfo: Khetha lokhu uma ibhulokhi yakho yomsebenzi izungeza phakathi kwezinsuku nobusuku.

work.title: Esizeni (Emsebenzini)
work.descriptionDay: Okwamanje usendaweni yemayini endaweni yakho yomsebenzi weshifu yosuku
work.descriptionNight: Okwamanje usendaweni yezimayini endaweni yakho yomsebenzi weshifu yasebusuku
work.descriptionNeutral: Okwamanje usendaweni yezimayini endaweni yakho yomsebenzi
work.quickInfoDay: Lokhu kusho ukuthi umjikelezo wakho uqala ukubala kusukela kubhulokhi yakho yomsebenzi weshifu yosuku.
work.quickInfoNight: Lokhu kusho ukuthi umjikelezo wakho uqala ukubala ukusuka kubhulokhi yakho yomsebenzi weshifu yasebusuku.
work.quickInfoNeutral: Lokhu kusho ukuthi umjikelezo wakho uqala ukubala ukusuka kubhulokhi yakho yamanje yomsebenzi.

rest.title: Ekhaya (Ekuphumuleni)
rest.quickInfo: Lokhu kunciphisa umjikelezo wakho ngobude bebhulokhi yakho yomsebenzi kuqala.

swingConfig.validation: Ukuhlukaniswa kwe-Swing kufanele kulingane nezinsuku ezingu-{{workBlockDays}} okungenani nosuku olungu-1 kushifti ngayinye.

work.lastNightBeforeHome: Izolo ebusuku ishifu ngaphambi kokundizela ekhaya

swing.finalDayShiftBeforeNights: Ukushintsha usuku lokugcina ngaphambi kokushintshela ebusuku
swing.dayShiftDayDescription: Usuku lweshifu yosuku {{dayNumber}} lwebhulogi yakho yomsebenzi
swing.firstNightShiftInBlock: Ishifu yokuqala yasebusuku kule block swing
swing.finalNightShiftBeforeHome: Ishifu lokugcina lasebusuku ngaphambi kokundizela ekhaya
swing.nightShiftDayDescription: Usuku lweshifu yasebusuku engu-{{dayNumber}} yendawo yakho yomsebenzi

header.title: Ukushintshanisa Kwakho Kuqala Nini?
header.subtitleWithPhase: Uku-{{phaseLabel}} khona manje—khetha namuhla nanoma iyiphi idethi, futhi sizokhipha imephu yonke ikhalenda lakho kusukela lapho
header.subtitleDefault: Khetha idethi ofuna ikhalenda yakho iqale ngalo—abantu abaningi bayayikhetha namuhla

guidance.title: Ukukhetha usuku lwakho
guidance.subtitle: Amathiphu asheshayo okusetha okusheshayo
guidance.body: Abantu abaningi bakhetha namuhla ukuze ikhalenda yabo iqale ngaso leso sikhathi. Kodwa ungakhetha noma iyiphi idethi—sizobala ukuzungezisa kwakho sisuka lapho.
guidance.hint: Khetha idethi eseduze kakhulu manje, ungalungisa izilungiselelo kamuva.

actions.saveAndReturnToSettings: Londoloza idethi yokuqala bese ubuyela kuzilungiselelo

phaseSelector.title: Khetha ukuthi iyiphi ingxenye yomjikelezo wakho ozoba kuyo

actions.saveAndReturnA11y: Londoloza isikhathi sokushintsha bese ubuyela kuzilungiselelo

subtitle.single: Khetha ukuthi uwubamba ngasiphi isikhathi usuku nosuku-sizosebenzisa lokhu ukulandelela amahora akho futhi sisethe izikhumbuzi
subtitle.multi: Iphethini yakho ihlanganisa {{shiftTypeLabel}}. Setha isikhathi sokuqala salezi zinguquko.

guidance.aboutBody: Ukuzungezisa kwakho kwe-{{patternName}} kuhlala kunjalo, kodwa sidinga izikhathi zakho zokuqala zeshifu ukuze u-Ellie akwazi ukulandelela amahora futhi akwazise ngaphambi kokuhamba ngakunye.
guidance.hint: Sebenzisa isikhathi sokuqala esiseduzane manje. Ungayishuna kamuva kuzilungiselelo.

definitions.twoShiftBody: Amashifu osuku aqala ngo-6 AM-6 PM - Amashifu asebusuku aqala ngo-6 PM-6 AM
definitions.threeShiftBody: Ekuseni: 6 AM-2 PM - Ntambama: 2 PM-10 PM - Ebusuku: 10 PM-6 AM

validation.hoursRange: Amahora kufanele abe phakathi kuka-1 no-12
validation.minutesRange: Amaminithi kufanele abe phakathi kuka-0 no-59

tips.title: Ithiphu ye-Pro
tips.subtitle: Indlela eshesha kakhulu yokukhetha isikhathi sokuqala esithembekile
tips.twoShift: Angiqiniseki? Iningi labasebenzi bamashifu ekushintsheni kwamahora ayi-12 baqala ngo-6 AM noma ngo-6 PM. Khetha okufanayo okuseduze-ungakulungisa kamuva kuzilungiselelo uma kudingeka.
tips.threeShift: Angiqiniseki? Izisebenzi eziningi zeshifu zamahora angu-8 ziqala ngo-6 AM, 2 PM, noma 10 PM. Khetha okufanayo okuseduze-ungakulungisa kamuva kuzilungiselelo uma kudingeka.

preview.subtitle: Bona ukuthi ishejuli yakho ibukeka kanjani
preview.title: Ukubuka kuqala kwakho kokuzungezisa

customPattern.subtitle: Setha ukuthi mangaki amashifu osebenza kuwo, bese uthola izinsuku ezingaki zekhefu—sizokukhombisa ukuthi libukeka kanjani
customPattern.success: Kubukeka kukuhle! Usebenza izinsuku ezingu-{{workDays}}, bese uthola izinsuku ezingu-{{daysOff}} zekhefu. Lokho ukuzungeza okuqinile.
customPattern.tip: Ithiphu: Izisebenzi eziningi zamashifu zithola ukushintshwa okungenani ngezinsuku ezi-3 zokungasebenzi kahle kakhulu. Umzimba wakho udinga isikhathi ukuze ululame phakathi kwezinguquko zokushwiba.
customPattern.title: Yakha Ukujikeleza Kwakho

validation.noOff: Wonke umuntu udinga isikhathi sokuphumula—engeza okungenani usuku olungu-1 lokuphumula ekujikelezeni kwakho
validation.noWork: Udinga okungenani ukushintshwa oku-1 ukuze ulandelele—ungeze amashifu osuku noma ebusuku
validation.tooLong: Ukuzungezisa kwakho kuyizinsuku ezingu-{{totalDays}} ubude—singakwazi ukuphatha kufika ezinsukwini ezingu-28 kuphela. Zama ukulifinyeza.

customPattern.warning: Le phethini iwumsebenzi onzima ({{workPercentage}}% umsebenzi). Cabangela ukungeza izinsuku zokuphumula ezengeziwe uma ukukhathala kuwukukhathazeka.

preview.cycleFlow: Umjikelezo ugeleza unqamule ezinsukwini ezingu-{{previewDays}} ezibonakalayo
preview.subtitle: {{workBlockDays}} izinsuku endaweni, bese {{restBlockDays}} izinsuku ekhaya
preview.swingSplit: Ukuhlukaniswa kwe-Swing: {{daysOnDayShift}} izinsuku zokushintsha kosuku + {{daysOnNightShift}} izinsuku zokushintsha ebusuku
preview.title: Ukubuka kuqala kwakho kwe-FIFO Rotation

fifoCustom.subtitle: Setha ibhulokhi yakho ekusayithi, ibhulokhi yasekhaya, nesitayela seshifu yebhulokhi yomsebenzi ukuze uthole ishejuli efanelana nomjikelezo wesayithi lakho.
fifoCustom.subtitleSecondary: Ibhulokhi yomsebenzi, ibhulokhi yokuphumula nohlukaniso lwephethini
fifoCustom.success: Ukusethwa okuqinile kwe-FIFO. {{workBlockDays}} izinsuku endaweni, bese {{restBlockDays}} izinsuku ekhaya.
fifoCustom.swingSubtitle: Hlukanisa ibhulokhi yakho yomsebenzi phakathi kwamashifu emini nasebusuku.
fifoCustom.tip: Ithiphu: Qondanisa ibhulokhi yakho yasekhaya nezidingo zokutholwa kanye nezohambo. Amaphethini e-FIFO asebenza kangcono uma ibhulokhi esele iyinde ngokwanele ukuthi ingasethwa kabusha ngaphambi kokuthi isayithi lakho elilandelayo liqalise.
fifoCustom.title: Yakha i-FIFO Rotation Yakho

validation.blocksMinimum: Amabhlokhi omsebenzi nezindawo zokuphumula kufanele ngayinye ibe okungenani usuku olungu-1.
validation.swingMismatch: Ukuhlukaniswa kwe-Swing kufanele kulingane nezinsuku ezingu-{{workBlockDays}} ngaphambi kokulondoloza.

fifoCustom.warning: Lolu hlelo lunzima ({{workPercentage}}% umsebenzi). Cabangela ukulingana nezinsuku eziningi zasekhaya uma ukukhathala kuba yinkinga.
fifoCustom.workPatternSubtitle: Ahlelwa kanjani amashifu akho ngenkathi usendaweni?

straight-days.title: Izinsuku Eziqondile
straight-days.description: Amashifu osuku lokusebenza kuphela kulo lonke ibhulokhi yomsebenzi (isb., 7am-7pm)

straight-nights.title: Ubusuku obuqondile
straight-nights.description: Amashifu okusebenza ebusuku alo lonke ibhulokhi yomsebenzi (isb., 7pm-7am)

swing.title: I-Swing Roster
swing.description: Shintshanisa amashifu emini kanye namashifu ebusuku ngesikhathi sokuvimba umsebenzi

a11y.adjustHint: Swayipha kwesobunxele noma kwesokudla ukulungisa inani
